title: WebAssembly (WASM) Transforms
description: Developer deploys WASM modules for custom event routing and filtering logic in Debezium CDC pipelines via Kafka Connect SMTs.
actors: WASM Module (compiled .wasm file on disk, loaded at configure time)
use_cases: Deploy WASM module for content-based topic routing (ContentBasedRouter)
Deploy WASM module for record filtering (Filter)
Configure SMT language as 'wasm.chicory' (compiled JIT) or 'wasm.chicory-interpreter' (interpreted)
Configure topic.expression with file: URI pointing to .wasm file
Configure condition expression with file: URI pointing to .wasm file
Restrict transform scope via topic.regex pattern
Handle null records: keep / drop / evaluate modes
Route record to new topic based on WASM evaluation result
Filter out records based on boolean WASM evaluation result
Access record fields: key, value, keySchema, valueSchema, topic, headers
Access nested struct fields via dot-path (e.g. value.before.id)
Return null from WASM router to keep original topic
Fail fast on invalid WASM return type (DebeziumException)
Fail fast on unsupported WASM engine name
Fail fast on malformed .wasm file URI

key_classes.name: ScriptingTransformation<R>
key_methods: configure(Map<String,?> configs) — selects Engine impl based on language prefix (jsr223.* / wasm.*), calls engine.configure(language, expression)
apply(R record) — topic regex gate, null-handling gate, delegates to doApply(record)

key_classes.name: ContentBasedRouter<R>
key_classes.doApply: topicName = engine.eval(record, String.class); return topicName==null ? record : record.newRecord(topicName, ...)

key_classes.name: WasmEngine
key_methods: configure(language, expression) — sets compiler flag, parses .wasm file via Parser.parse(Path.of(URI.create(expression))), builds ChicoryEngine
getBindings(record) — builds Map: key, value, keySchema, valueSchema, topic, header(Map<String,RecordHeader>)
eval(ConnectRecord, Class<T>) — calls engine.eval(bindings), validates return type

key_classes.name: ChicoryEngine
key_methods: eval(Object proxyObject) — registers root binding object, calls WASM export 'process(rootObjPtr)', returns result from objects list
get(proxyObjectRef, fieldNamePtr) — resolves dot-path field on Map/Struct/Schema/RecordHeader (@WasmExport)
setString/setBool/setNull — write results back to host object store (@WasmExport)
execution_modes: Compiler mode (wasm.chicory): MachineFactoryCompiler::compile — JIT to Java bytecode
Interpreter mode (wasm.chicory-interpreter): default Instance builder — interpreted

wasm_module_contracts.router_wasm: Must export 'process'; must return pointer to a string object (topic name) or null
wasm_module_contracts.filter_wasm: Must export 'process'; must return pointer to a boolean object
wasm_module_contracts.field_access: Accessed via 'get' host call with dot-path strings (e.g. 'value.before.id', 'header.idh.value')

test_scenarios_wasm_router: shouldFailOnInvalidReturnValue — WASM returns boolean (not String) → DebeziumException
shouldRoute — value.before.id==1 routes to 'ones', else keeps original topic
shouldRouteMongoDbFormat — JSON after field matching, routes to 'kretchmar'
shouldApplyTopicRegex — only applies to topics matching 'orig.*'
shouldKeepNulls — null record keeps original topic (default null.handling.mode=keep)
shouldDropNulls — null record dropped with null.handling.mode=drop
shouldEvaluateNulls — null record evaluated; WASM returns 'nulls' topic
test_scenarios_wasm_filter: shouldKeepNulls / shouldDropNulls / shouldEvaluateNulls — null handling modes
key_relationships: ChicoryEngine wraps Chicory Instance with @HostModule('env') host function bindings
ChicoryEngine uses MachineFactoryCompiler for compiler mode, default interpreter otherwise
important_notes: @Incubating on ContentBasedRouter, Filter, ChicoryEngine — feature is experimental
WASM files referenced via 'file:' URI in topic.expression / condition config properties
Host ABI uses integer object references (indices into a List<Object>); not direct memory pointers for Java objects
Compiler mode may fail for some WASM modules; fallback is 'wasm.chicory-interpreter'
Null routing: ContentBasedRouter returns null from WASM → original topic preserved (not dropped)
